title: Brink of Death
description: Everything is out to kill you. Will you survive?
body:
_**SHADERS ARE ON BY DEFAULT, MAKE SURE YOU CAN RUN THEM.**_
## Every **move**. Every **attack**. Every **decision**.

Every small action matters. Adapt or **die**.

Experience survival in a brand new light, with heavy emphasis on progression. Level up, gear up, and experience a world that evolves with you. And remember, death is **punishing**. Good luck.

_Check out the gallery for more specifics._

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Title music by Kevin Macleod.

This modpack is NOT easy, but it is also not unfair. There are a lot of QOL features and it is fully functional with multiplayer. The successor to Hardened Survival!

</details>
